name: Cinnamon Swirl
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together shortening and white sugar until smooth.
2. Add cornstarch, vinegar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and water to the mixture. Mix until well combined.
3. Stir in cinnamon and remaining white sugar for the filling.
4. Grease and flour a loaf tin (united states).
5. Divide the batter into three equal parts.
6. Layer one third of the batter at the bottom of the loaf pan.
7. Sprinkle with the cinnamon/sugar mixture.
8. Layer another third of the batter on top, then sprinkle again with cinnamon/sugar.
9. Spread out the remaining batter evenly over the top layer.
10. Slice through the batter at various points with a knife to create an irregular marbled effect.
11. Sprinkle any leftover cinnamon/sugar mixture over the slices.
12. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
